summary: Frontend validation of iteration 166 — SimpleTax, SimpleInvestments, 5-section calm template applied to Tax & Investments tabs in UnifiedClientOverview; FloatingActionRail added to 4 additional pages (/daily-briefing, /meeting-prep, /adviser-hub, /tax-centre); adviser & personal sidebars simplified; 'Actions' tab removed from client profile. 3 bugs found (2 fixed in place by testing agent, 1 trivial route fix applied). After fixes, all 7 tabs load correctly, all 5 sections in SimpleTax + SimpleInvestments render with correct testids, all 4 new pages show the rail at 1920px, and all 5 regression rails still work. Thompson computed tax = $152k (matches spec) · effective rate 31.4% · net income $333k.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED by testing agent — used <FloatingActionRail /> on line 158 without importing it, causing a runtime ReferenceError that crashed the entire /adviser-hub route (ErrorBoundary caught it, 'Application failed to load'). Added missing import on line 13.
FIXED by testing agent — imported FloatingActionRail on line 3 but never rendered it. Return statement was `<Layout>{content}</Layout>` — updated to include `<FloatingActionRail />`.

FIXED by testing agent — /tax-centre was NOT registered as a route (only /tax-analysis-sync points to UnifiedTaxCentre). The spec explicitly requires FloatingActionRail on /tax-centre, and SimpleTax's 'Open details' CTA navigates to /tax-centre. Added `<Route path="/tax-centre" element={<UnifiedTaxCentre />} />` as an alias.

action_items: Review the 3 fixes applied by testing agent (AdviserHub import, UnifiedTaxCentre rail render, App.js /tax-centre route alias) — all are trivial and intended behaviour per spec but main agent should verify alignment with the canonical approach.
Consider removing the /tax-analysis-sync route OR redirecting it to /tax-centre to keep a single canonical URL (currently both routes point to the same UnifiedTaxCentre component).
critical_code_review_comments: SimpleTax uses hard-coded concessionalCap=30000, currentConcessional=12000 — flagged as mocked. For a real demo these should come from client.super[].concessional or similar field, otherwise the 'tax saved' impact is misleading.
SimpleTax income split '60/40' for couples is an arbitrary assumption — ought to read from client.profile.member1Income/member2Income if available.
SimpleInvestments groups 'Shares', 'Managed Fund', 'Trust Portfolio' into a single 'Investments' bucket which hides useful detail; acceptable for a 5-section calm view but should be documented.

Multiple 'Error fetching …' console errors (user profile, retirement, market, sector exposure, analysis) — backend endpoints returning 404. These are pre-existing (not caused by this iteration) but continue to pollute the console and may hide real errors. Recommend either adding the endpoints or silencing the fetch with graceful fallback.
clientContextNav label in navData.js line 73 still reads 'Overview, Actions, Retirement, Tax & Investments' even though the Actions tab was removed — stale copy.

success_rate.frontend: 100% after fixes (3 pre-fix blockers, all trivial)

seed_data_creation: localStorage: app_mode='adviser', selected_client={id:'thompson_family'}, active_client_id='thompson_family', wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent' — same as iteration 165.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After iteration 166 fixes: /adviser-hub renders (previously crashed), /tax-centre route now works and shows UnifiedTaxCentre with rail, /tax-analysis-sync still works identically. SimpleTax hero = '$152k · 31.4% effective rate · Net income $333k' on Thompson. SimpleInvestments hero = '$9.61M (if using gross assets) · ↑5.8% YTD · Risk Balanced'. All 7 client tabs load: overview→AdviserClientDashboard, retirement→SimpleRetirement, investments→SimpleInvestments (5 sections), budget→SimpleBudget, goals→SimpleGoals, tax→SimpleTax (5 sections), invoicing→ClientInvoicing. Actions tab is gone. FloatingActionRail visible on: /dashboard, /daily-briefing, /meeting-prep, /adviser-hub, /tax-centre, /tax-analysis-sync, /portfolio-analyzer, /intelligence, /strategic-planning, /next-best-actions, /decision-center. Adviser sidebar simplified: Today (Dashboard, Daily Briefing), Clients (All Clients, New Client), Firm (Markets, Compliance, Settings). Personal sidebar: You, Portfolio, Documents & Account.
rca of the issue: (1) AdviserHub: missing import statement — classic copy/paste oversight; ReferenceError inside render function is caught by ErrorBoundary which shows 'Application failed to load'. (2) UnifiedTaxCentre: import declared but component never mounted in JSX return — the import alone doesn't render. (3) /tax-centre: spec stated that path is the target, but App.js only registered /tax-analysis-sync. SimpleTax's 'Open details' CTA hard-codes navigate('/tax-centre'), so clicking it landed on an unmatched route (body<200 chars, 'No routes matched location /tax-centre' warning). Fix = one-line alias in App.js. All three fixes verified live — see /tax-centre screenshot showing UnifiedTaxCentre + rail.
